top_signals.title: Credit Titans Warn of Shakeout on Debt Deals That ‘Don’t Make Sense’
top_signals.summary: Davidson Kempner's Suzanne Gibbons, Glendon Capital's Holly Kim, Sculptor Capital's Brett Klein and Matthew Rahmani of Perella Weinberg speak with Bloomberg News' Irene Garcia Perez on how credit markets are navigating heightened volatility, higher-for-longer interest rates and the credit market's ``cockroach'' problem at Bloomberg's Global Credit Forum in New York on June 3. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin caps a dismal week as price wallows more than 50% below its all-time high
top_signals.summary: A rebound in the digital currency, or characteristic dip-buying by investors, is yet to take place.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
